common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this API to upload multiple image files (less than 9 images).

request_params.name: image
request_params.description: image files. Max 10.0 MB each. Image format accepted: JPG, JPEG, PNG. image number should be less than 9

request_params.name: scene
request_params.description: The scene where the picture is used, The value range is normal or desc; normal: we will process the image as a square image, it is recommended to use when uploading item image; desc: we will not process the image, it is recommended to use when uploading the image of extend_description, if you do not upload this field, it will be normal.

only applicable to whitelisted sellers.
only support 1:1 and 3:4; 

1:1 by default.
request_params.name: ratio

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: warning
response_params.description: Indicate warning message you should take care.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

children.description: Indicate error type if this index's image upload processing hit error. Empty if no error happened for this index's image .
children.name: error

children.description: Indicate error detail if this index's image upload processing hit error. Empty if no error happened for this index's image .
children.name: message

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://open.admin.uat.shopee.io/api/v2/media_space/upload_image?partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => array('image'=> new CURLFILE('/path/to/file') /* Replace with actual file path */),
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: multipart/form-data'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

curl --location --request POST 'https://open.admin.uat.shopee.io/api/v2/media_space/upload_image?partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp' \
--form 'image=@"/path/to/file"'  #replace the sample path with your file path

update_log_list.content: Add a new ratio field. Support to upload 3:4 image
